title: playsound mod
description: This is a fabric mod that adds a /playsound command. You can play any sound with it and change the pitch that it plays.
body:
This is a mod that adds a simple /playsound command. You can change the pitch of the sound you want to play. /playsound <sound> [<pitch>] [<volume>] [<looping>]
To loop the sound put true on the [<looping>]
